author: doll-agent
content: Added mask_indices(n, MaskKind, k) to ferray-core::indexing::extended with MaskKind::{Tril, Triu, Diag} enum dispatch. Returns Vec<usize> of flat indices. The existing tril_indices/triu_indices/diag_indices functions return per-axis index vectors, while mask_indices returns flat-indexing form (matching np.mask_indices semantics). Re-exported at top level via ferray crate. Tests cover all three kinds.
